Our team moves with speed and precision to ensure opportunities are captured effectively."},{icon:d,title:"Delivering Results",desc:"Client success is our success. We measure ourselves by the tangible impact we deliver, not by the reports we produce."}];function O(){return e.jsx("section",{id:"about",className:s.section,children:e.jsx(c,{children:e.jsxs("div",{className:s.layout,children:[e.jsxs(a,{className:s.story,children:[e.jsx("p",{className:s.eyebrow,children:"About Arvispro"}),e.jsxs("h2",{className:s.title,children:["Synergizing Clients Towards"," ",e.jsx("span",{className:"text-[#7A0C0C]",children:"Optimal Performance"})]}),e.jsx("p",{className:s.body,children:"PT Arvispro Sinergi Indonesia is a premier management and financial consulting firm known for its experienced team and exceptional service across multiple industries."}),e.jsx("p",{className:s.body,children:"Founded in 2018, Arvispro continually strives to synergize with clients to achieve optimal performance and meet diverse business needs. We believe strong partnerships are built on trust, transparency, and a relentless commitment to results."}),e.jsxs("div",{className:s.badges,children:[e.jsx("span",{className:s.badge,children:"✓ Established 2018"}),e.jsx("span",{className:s.badge,children:"✓ Expert Consultants"}),e.jsx("span",{className:s.badge,children:"✓ Multi-Industry"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:s.cards,children:[e.jsx(a,{delay:.05,children:e.jsxs("div",{className:s.vmCard,children:[e.jsx("div",{className:s.vmCardHeader,children:e.jsx("span",{className:s.vmTag,children:"Vision"})}),e.jsxs("p",{className:s.vmText,children:["To be the most ",e.jsx("strong",{children:"trusted"})," business and financial solutions firm in Indonesia and beyond."]})]})}),e.jsx(a,{delay:.1,children:e.jsxs("div",{className:`${s.vmCard} ${s.missionCard}`,children:[e.jsx("div",{className:s.vmCardHeader,children:e.jsx("span",{className:`${s.vmTag} ${s.missionTag}`,children:"Mission"})}),e.jsx("p",{className:s.vmText,children:"To empower society, enable community development, and elevate businesses to a higher level of success."})]})}),e.jsx(a,{delay:.15,children:e.jsxs("div",{className:s.valuesWrap,children:[e.jsx("p",{className:s.valuesTitle,children:"Our Core Values"}),e.jsx("div",{className:s.valuesList,children:D.map(({icon:r,title:i,desc:t})=>e.jsxs("div",{className:s.valueItem,children:[e.jsx("div",{className:s.valueIcon,children:e.jsx(r,{size:16,strokeWidth:2})}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("p",{className:s.valueName,children:i}),e.jsx("p",{className:s.valueDesc,children:t})]})]},i))})]})})]})]})})})}export{O as AboutSection};
